identity.name: Only Great Pizza Paris
identity.target_audience: Food enthusiasts, design-conscious tourists, locals seeking quality

usage.h1: font-heading font-bold text-6xl tracking-tight uppercase leading-none
usage.caption: font-body text-sm text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-widest

textures.paper: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 400 400' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

pizza_pin.description: Minimalist teardrop pin with a simple dot or slice implication

Button.styles: font-heading uppercase tracking-widest rounded-none border-2 border-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-white transition-all duration-300

Card.styles: bg-white border border-border rounded-sm overflow-hidden hover:border-primary transition-colors duration-300 group
Card.image_styles: aspect-[4/3] object-cover w-full grayscale group-hover:grayscale-0 transition-all duration-500

Badge.styles: rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-heading uppercase tracking-wider border border-current

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Update `tailwind.config.js` with the new colors (cream, brick, olive, ink) and fonts (Antonio, DM Sans, Caveat).
2. Update `index.css` to import the new Google Fonts and apply the base styles (bg-cream, text-ink).
3. Create a new `PizzaPin` component using the custom SVG path provided or a Lucide icon customized to look like a pin.
4. Refactor `PizzeriaCard` to use the new 'Architectural' style: sharp corners, condensed uppercase titles, grayscale-to-color hover effect on images.
5. Update `Explore` page to use a Bento grid layout (mix of col-span-1 and col-span-2 cards).
6. Ensure all text contrast meets APCA standards (use dark ink on cream, white on brick).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid colors or subtle noise textures.
Avoid rounded corners > 8px. Prefer sharp (0px) or slightly rounded (2px-4px) for this architectural aesthetic.
Use uppercase text for headings and buttons with `tracking-widest`.
Use the 'cream' background (#FDFBF7) as the main canvas, not pure white.
